module.operation.description:
### Tips
* Repeatedly farm the first stage of Practical Training, which requires no stamina.
* Used to complete the Weekly Pass mission: complete Standard Operations 20 times.
* Start from the main menu or the Standard Operations selection screen.
module.operation.title: Standard Operations
module.operation_action.log.进入常规行动时连续滚轮无: No progress detected while scrolling during Standard Operations entry. Stopped to prevent background freeze
module.operation_action.log.进入常规行动超时: Timed out while entering Standard Operations
